title: The Mirrored Labyrinth

features.name: the reflecting lens
features.desc-on-touch: a glass sphere at the heart of the space where the archive sees itself observing. You are inside the lens and outside it both at once.

features.name: the rearranged passage
features.desc-on-touch: a corridor whose walls list identical entries in different orders. You read them forward on arrival, backward on leaving. Both versions change what you understood.

features.name: nested watchtowers
features.desc-on-touch: small raised structures where observers keep records of each other. The tower that watches the tower that watches the tower. No one remembers which records which.

features.name: the tally chamber
features.desc-on-touch: walls scratched with identical marks. One tally counts reflections, one counts readers, one counts nights the archive grew. Together they form no sum.

inscription: the path inward and the path outward have learned to fold into each other, each watching the other's careful shape

file.name: Episode_3_and_5_Dialogue_Reconstruction_Variant_B.txt
file.note: transcribed speech where the same lines appear in different orders. The archive can no longer tell which sequence was recorded first. Both are equally archived now.

exits.label: back through the turning lens where reflections learned to move independently
deeper toward surfaces that catch light from inside the glass
toward the older mirrors whose reflections have taken other routes
